SELECT lower(input_string) AS lower_case FROM test_lower WHERE input_string = 'CLICKHOUSE';
SELECT lower(input_string) AS lower_case, length(lower(input_string)) FROM test_lower;
SELECT lower(input_string) FROM test_lower WHERE lower(input_string) != input_string;
SELECT lower(t1.input_string) FROM test_lower AS t1 JOIN test_lower AS t2 ON lower(t1.input_string) = lower(t2.input_string) WHERE t1.input_string != t2.input_string;
WITH (SELECT lower(input_string) FROM test_lower) AS lowered_strings SELECT count(*) FROM lowered_strings WHERE lowered_strings = 'hello world';
SELECT input_string, lower(input_string) FROM (SELECT input_string FROM test_lower) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE test_lower_ext (id Int32, input_string String);
INSERT INTO test_lower_ext VALUES (1, 'SIMPLE TEST'), (2, 'NESTED FUNCTION'), (3, 'ClickHouse');
SELECT t1.id, lower(t1.input_string) FROM test_lower_ext AS t1 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_lower_ext AS t2 WHERE t1.id < t2.id);
